evidence.description: Logged-in Sequencing.com marketplace showed 164 visible marketplace report/card positions across 3 pages of 75, 75, and 14 cards. The captured cards include repeated slugs, so this evidence confirms the authenticated marketplace position total while unique package identity recovery remains separate.

Logged-in Sequencing.com marketplace Next.js page props exposed 164 reportsGroups item positions with title, provider, price, category, href, and sample-report metadata when available. These positions collapse to 87 unique current hrefs because reports appear in multiple category groups.

Logged-in in-app browser recheck on 2026-06-24 confirmed 164 reportsGroups positions and 87 unique raw route slugs. The raw live route slug set had no missing or extra slugs compared with the normalized authenticated ledger.
Public aggregate marketplace HTML exposed 150 unique /marketplace/ URLs.
Authenticated screenshots identified four additional cards not represented as public aggregate URLs.

authenticatedBrowserCapture.method: Logged-in in-app browser DOM card extraction through visible pagination controls.
authenticatedBrowserCapture.finding: The authenticated UI confirms 164 visible marketplace report/card positions. The local seed models 154 unique named package identities; duplicate authenticated positions are category placements and are not seeded as duplicate packages.

authenticatedPagePropsCapture.finding: The authenticated page props identify all 164 marketplace group positions. They do not imply 164 unique report packages because many hrefs appear in multiple groups.

authenticatedLiveRecheck.method: Logged-in in-app browser extraction of aggregate counts from __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.reportsGroups.
authenticatedLiveRecheck.finding: The live logged-in marketplace count still matches the 164-position target; the local normalized authenticated ledger has no raw route slug gaps.

policy.replacementRule: Do not seed anonymous or duplicate report packages. Add a new named report package only after authenticated page, SSR JSON, screenshot, or detail-page evidence identifies a non-duplicate report identity and metadata.
policy.rawGenomeBoundary: Coverage tracking contains no raw genome data.
